arxiv_papers.title: How adaptation to food resources and death rates shape oscillatory dynamics in a microbial population
arxiv_papers.snippet: Microbes constantly interact with their environment by depleting and transforming food sources. Theoretical studies have mainly focused on Lotka-Volterra models, which do not account for food source dynamics.
